title: Is it possible to instantly have views appear on a user's workspace/board after installing an app?
excerpt: I need an object view and a board view to appear right after a user installs an app. As far as I know you can do this in the onboarding settings but it only allows one feature as the starting point.

posts.author: effex07 (Mike Atilano)
posts.cookedHtml: I need an object view and a board view to appear right after a user installs an app. As far as I know you can do this in the onboarding settings but it only allows one feature as the starting point.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @effex07,

As of today it is not possible to do that for a custom object.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias
